message:
feat: implement --label subgraph filtering for Go parity

When --label is specified, the analysis is now scoped to the label's
connected component. This matches the Go tool's ComputeLabelSubgraph
behavior:

1. Find "core" issues with the target label
2. Walk the weakly connected component transitively (both dependency
   directions) to include all related issues
3. Rebuild the analyzer with the filtered issue set
4. Run triage/plan/insights/priority on the scoped graph

Previously, --label only computed label health metadata without
filtering the actual analysis — a significant parity gap.

Adds compute_label_subgraph() in label_intel.rs with 4 tests covering
core+deps, empty label, no matches, and transitive walks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
